# darce.xyz
> Portfolio and case studies for Daniel Arcé, product engineer.
> Product engineer with 14+ years building accessible software for consumer platforms, media companies, and startups. Front-end architecture, WCAG compliance, and AI accessibility tooling.

## Pages
- / — Home
- /work/ — Index of project case studies
- /about/ — Bio, role focus, strengths
- /research/ — Index of technical writing and experiments

## Projects
- /projects/photoshelter/ — Led WCAG remediation, front-end systems work, and R&D prototyping for a cloud-based media platform
- /projects/apple/ — Built launch-critical landing pages, a CSS-animated email campaign, and internal workflow tooling for Apple’s iPhone X release
- /projects/msnbc/ — Prototyped and shipped a live video platform under a six-month deadline for a major broadcast news network
- /projects/barbarabeirne/ — Recovered a photography archive from a defunct Flash site, rebuilt the portfolio, and later rewrote the live site with Web Components
- /projects/bauhausdances/ — Designed a visual identity rooted in the film’s source material and built a custom WordPress theme with self-hosted video

## Research
- /research/rotation-matrices/ — A browser experiment that makes rotation matrices and perspective projection, normally abstracted by WebGL, visible using only TypeScript, DOM elements, and CSS transforms
- /research/order-book/ — An interactive guide to bids, asks, spread, and visible market depth using live Binance WebSocket data

## Contact
- Email: daniel.arce@gmail.com

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danarce/
